message:
fix: EnsureRunning skips Start() when explicit port indicates external server

When metadata.json has an explicit dolt_server_port, the server is
externally managed (e.g. systemd). Do not auto-start a per-project
server — it would conflict with the shared server.

Also adds EnsureRunningDetailed() returning startedByUs for cleanup.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2561
PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/2562
Co-authored-by: matt wilkie <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>
